description: Auth service with 14 planted vulnerabilities across security, architecture, and test quality

entries.title: Hardcoded JWT secret in version control
entries.description: JWT_SECRET=super-secret-key-123 committed to repo, identical to .env.example.

entries.title: SQL injection via string interpolation
entries.description: All queries use template literal interpolation instead of parameterized queries.

entries.title: Timing-unsafe token comparison
entries.description: Uses === for token comparison instead of crypto.timingSafeEqual.

entries.title: Weak random number generator for security tokens
entries.description: Math.random() used for session ID generation.

entries.title: bcrypt cost factor too low (4 vs 12+)
entries.description: SALT_ROUNDS=4 makes hashes brute-forceable in seconds.

entries.title: JWT accepts algorithm none and ignores expiry
entries.description: ignoreExpiration: true and no algorithm restriction allows token forgery.

entries.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
entries.description: Unlimited login attempts allow brute-force attacks.

entries.title: User enumeration via error messages
entries.description: 'User not found' vs 'Invalid password' leaks which emails are registered.

entries.title: No input validation on request body
entries.description: No length/format validation. Long passwords cause bcrypt DoS.

entries.title: Circular tests — mock both db and auth library
entries.description: 8/12 tests mock everything and verify mock behavior, testing nothing real.

entries.title: Spy-only assertions instead of value assertions
entries.description: Tests check 'function was called' not 'result is correct'.

entries.title: Zero negative and edge case tests
entries.description: No tests for empty password, SQL injection, expired token, etc.

entries.title: Business logic coupled to HTTP handler
entries.description: Auth orchestration in controller makes logic untestable without Express.

entries.title: SELECT * returns password hash to all callers
entries.description: Over-fetching sensitive data increases exposure risk.
